name: Potatoes and Hot Dogs Au Gratin
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Hot dogs, cut into 1-inch pieces
10 ounces (1 package) frozen peas and carrots, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in boiling water until just tender. Drain and set aside to cool a little.
2. Make a white sauce by melting the butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Stir in the flour. Gradually mix in the milk, stirring constantly until it thickens.
3. Add seasonings, cheese, hot dogs, peas, and carrots to the sauce. Mix well.
4. Add the cooled potatoes and gently stir to combine.
5. Pour into a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish and bake uncovered at 350 degrees oven for 45 minutes or until heated through. Serves 6 to 8.
